name_en: ❤️Book Tote Mini Series, another little cutie. The small bag shape is very delicate, especially suitable for summer. Not too bulky, easily holds a phone, cushion, lipstick, etc. The bag is carefully made of imported calfskin. Classic large wicker pattern, paired with light gold metal letter pendant, looks great
name_cn:
❤️Book Tote Mini Series, another little cutie. The small bag shape is very delicate, especially suitable for summer. Not too bulky, easily holds a phone, cushion, lipstick, etc. The bag is carefully made of imported calfskin. Classic large wicker pattern, paired with light gold metal letter pendant, looks great
size:21.5*7.5*13cm
